planningOnlyJustification: Full-delivery spec. Planning packets from bubbles.analyst, bubbles.ux, bubbles.design, and bubbles.plan have been materialised into spec.md / design.md / scopes.md as part of SCOPE-01. Implementation continues in the same spec under workflowMode=full-delivery; no separate implementation spec.

certification.notes: Spec materialised from prior planning packets (analyst, ux, design, plan). SCOPE-01 bootstrap + SCOPE-02..08 implemented pending validation (registry foundation, SST config block, LLM tool-use bridge, deterministic tools, internal_retrieval, web search providers + SearxNG, cite-back verifier). 7 of 18 scopes implemented; scopes 09-18 Not Started. completedScopes intentionally empty — per the Bubbles control plane it lists scopes that have been certified Done by bubbles.validate, not scopes whose implementation code exists. Pre-existing issues resolved in-session: (1) LLM client moved to openknowledge/llm subpackage to preserve capability-foundation boundary; (2) premature scenario contract referencing not-yet-registered tools removed (deferred to SCOPE-12).

transitionRequests.summary: Amend spec 061 provenance gate: extend Source taxonomy to {SourceArtifact, SourceWeb, SourceToolComputation} and extend CanonicalRefusalBody with 5 spec 064 refusal causes (budget-exhausted, tool-unavailable, fabricated-source-blocked, internal-only-restricted, ambiguous-not-clarified). Additive; existing SourceArtifact behaviour and existing gate tests unchanged. Blocks spec 064 SCOPE-13 (Telegram surface). SCOPE-11/12/14/15/16/17/18 may proceed in parallel. Closed 2026-05-31 — spec 061 merged additively at done ceiling.

Request spec 049 to add Grafana dashboard panels (iterations p95, USD spend rate, refusal rate by cause, fabricated-source rate as a security single-stat, tool call rate by tool, per-tool latency p95, budget exhausted by scope, compaction-signal rate) and Prometheus alert rules (fabricated_source rate > 0, monthly budget hit, per-user budget hit, tool-error rate > 0.1/s, refusal-rate spike) for the new openknowledge_* metric series. No scrape-config change required (metrics ride the existing /metrics endpoint). Local Prometheus collectors + redacted INFO log line per turn shipped in SCOPE-14.

Application-layer egress allowlist (EgressAllowlistTransport, deny-by-default, exact-host match, scheme-guarded, userinfo-stripped), SanitizeSnippet (control-char strip + UTF-8 repair + MaxSnippetRunes=2000 truncation + suspicious-pattern metric), API-key non-leakage regression guards, and ContentHash-over-sanitised contract have shipped locally for SCOPE-15. Request spec 020 to review: (a) v1 exact-match allowlist policy, (b) whether wildcards should be a follow-up, (c) whether a network-layer egress firewall / container egress policy should layer on top of the application-layer gate, (d) whether SearxNG's own outbound traffic (engines:) should be constrained at the deploy adapter layer.

Local web-provider CircuitBreaker shipped: three-state machine (Closed/HalfOpen/Open), SST-bound thresholds (failure_threshold=5, open_window_seconds=60, half_open_after_seconds=30) — all fail-loud, no defaults (G028). New TerminationToolUnavailable + mid-loop circuit-open detection + RefusalToolUnavailable mapping. New metrics openknowledge_circuit_state{provider} (gauge) and openknowledge_circuit_trips_total{provider} (counter) with bounded provider cardinality. Adversarial coverage: Open short-circuits without inner-provider invocation, ErrInvalidQuery does NOT count, non-counting errors leave state alone, half-open probe failure re-arms Open, concurrency-safe State() under -race. Request spec 022 to review (a) whether the v1 thresholds match the operational-resilience playbook (connector supervisor uses 5 panics; should there be a runtime.resilience.default_* SST block?), (b) whether an explicit health-check endpoint contribution is required for operator dashboards, (c) whether the budget-exhaustion refusal-with-capture handshake should be lifted into a cross-subsystem graceful-degradation pattern in spec 022.

SCOPE-17 e2e scaffolding shipped: tests/e2e/agent/openknowledge_e2e_test.go with 7 test functions (UC-064-A01..A06 + adversarial G021 fabricated-source). All skip honestly with explicit messages naming the routed finding. go vet -tags e2e clean. SCOPE-17 cannot close because six upstream infrastructure gaps block end-to-end execution: (1) ml/app/routes/chat.py has no real Ollama dispatch path — returns HTTP 501 without fixture header (SCOPE-09 owner); (2) /v1/agent/invoke does not run capture-as-fallback (Telegram-facade-only today; spec 061 owner); (3) no fixture-fabricated-cite test mode in chat.py for the adversarial G021 path (SCOPE-08 owner); (4) no per-test per-query token budget override knob (SCOPE-09 wiring owner); (5) no per-test tool-allowlist override knob (SCOPE-09 wiring owner); (6) smackerel.sh test e2e does not export AGENT_INVOKE_URL to the Go test container (spec 023 owner). bubbles.workflow to dispatch each finding to its owner; the e2e file activates automatically as each finding lands with no SCOPE-17-side change.

reworkQueue.summary: Placeholder: SCOPE-10 remains awaiting cross-spec resolution of PKT-061-A. Close when spec 061 returns merged-evidence. RESOLVED 2026-05-31 — spec 061 accepted the amendment additively within its done ceiling; see PKT-061-A-RESPONSE.md.

SCOPE-14 local metrics + redacted trace logging shipped (9 Prometheus collectors, 12 unit tests incl. TestOpenKnowledgeMetrics_RejectsUnknownCause_AdversarialG021, agent emits one openknowledge.turn INFO line per turn with prompt SHA-256 and redacted tool trace). Awaiting spec 049 to land dashboard panels + alert rules per PKT-049-A. Close when spec 049 returns response packet.

SCOPE-15 local items shipped: EgressAllowlistTransport (deny-by-default, exact-host, scheme-guarded, userinfo-stripped), SanitizeSnippet + openknowledge_suspicious_snippet_total{provider} metric, ContentHash-over-sanitised, API-key non-leakage regression guard, AllowedEgressHosts SST key with format validation, wiring composes effective allowlist as (provider_endpoint host ∪ AllowedEgressHosts). Awaiting spec 020 review of (a) v1 exact-match policy, (b) wildcard follow-up question, (c) network-layer egress firewall / container egress policy as additive defence, (d) SearxNG upstream-engines constraint at the deploy adapter layer.

SCOPE-16 local items shipped: web.CircuitBreaker (Closed/HalfOpen/Open with concurrency-safe state transitions, 12 unit tests incl. 3 adversarial G021 cases), SST sub-block assistant.open_knowledge.circuit_breaker.{failure_threshold,open_window_seconds,half_open_after_seconds} (all required > 0, validated fail-loud), agent-loop short-circuit on provider_circuit_open → TerminationToolUnavailable → RefusalToolUnavailable, new openknowledge_circuit_state{provider} + openknowledge_circuit_trips_total{provider} metrics (bounded cardinality), wiring wraps SearxNG provider in breaker. Awaiting spec 022 review of (a) v1 threshold alignment with operational-resilience playbook, (b) whether an openknowledge health-check endpoint contribution is required for operator dashboards, (c) whether the budget-exhaustion refusal-with-capture handshake should be lifted into a cross-subsystem graceful-degradation pattern.

SCOPE-17 status=Blocked. E2E scaffolding (tests/e2e/agent/openknowledge_e2e_test.go, 7 test funcs covering UC-064-A01..A06 + adversarial G021 fabricated-source) shipped and skips honestly with explicit per-finding messages. SCOPE-17 cannot close until the six routed findings (PKT-WORKFLOW-A) land. PARTIAL CLOSURE 2026-05-31 — Finding #1 RESOLVED: ml/app/routes/chat.py now dispatches a real LLM turn via litellm against OLLAMA_URL when no fixture header is present (G028 fail-loud; provider errors map to typed envelopes; both fixture modes preserved). Live evidence: gemma3:4b end_turn + tool_use turns succeed end-to-end against the dev stack; 475 passed / 1 opt-in skipped in ml/tests. Findings #2-#6 still pending: (2) capture-as-fallback on /v1/agent/invoke, (3) fixture-fabricated-cite test mode, (4) per-test per-query token budget override, (5) per-test tool-allowlist override, (6) smackerel.sh test e2e exports AGENT_INVOKE_URL. Close when bubbles.workflow returns resolution evidence for the remaining five findings.

completedPhaseClaims.evidence: tests/e2e/agent/openknowledge_e2e_test.go (scaffolding, 7 funcs, all skip honestly); go vet -tags e2e clean; route packet specs/064-open-ended-knowledge-agent/route-packets/PKT-WORKFLOW-A.md filed with six infrastructure findings blocking close-out. SCOPE-17 status=Blocked in scopes.md.

docs/Operations.md (+~200 lines, Open-Knowledge Assistant Agent section), docs/Development.md (+~50 lines, Spec 064 subsection), docs/Testing.md (+1 para fabricated-cite fixture note), docs/Deployment.md (+~75 lines, Spec 064 Deployment Notes), deploy/contract.yaml (+~110 lines, sstKeyCatalog with 21 assistant.open_knowledge.* keys + 3 per-env keys), deploy/README.md (+10 lines). regression-baseline-guard.sh PASSED, artifact-lint.sh PASSED, compose_contract_test.go green. PII grep clean (no real hostnames/IPs/tailnet ids introduced).
